name: Georgia
description: Georgia is an emerging affordable destination for medical and engineering students. Its universities are WHO-recognized and MCI-approved, making it an excellent choice for Indian medical aspirants.

tuitionFees.undergraduate: Affordable Education: Tuition fees and living costs are lower compared to many Western countries, making it financially accessible
tuitionFees.postgraduate: Welcoming Environment: Georgians are known for their hospitality, making it easier for international students to feel at home.

requirements: No visa required for Indian nationals (up to 360-day stay visa-free)
Register at Civil Registry Agency within 45 days of arrival
visaRequirements.processingTime: to Study in Georgia --- SLIDE --- Visa Process Processing Time The processing time for the short–term visa application at the Embassy of Georgia is mi

workPermit.duringStudy: No official restriction on working hours for students
workPermit.postStudy: Temporary residence permit available for graduates
workPermit.notes: Low cost of living; growing tech sector with increasing job opportunities

languageRequirements.notes: English proficiency required for English programs; Georgian not required

topUniversities.name: Admission Letter: Acceptance letter from a recognized Georgian university

faqs.question: Is it easy to get a student visa for Georgia?
faqs.answer: With proper documentation and financial proof, obtaining a student visa for Georgia is straightforward. MVR Consultants can guide you through the entire process.

faqs.question: What are the tuition fees in Georgia?
faqs.answer: Tuition fees vary by university and program. Contact our counselors for program-specific fee structures.

faqs.question: Can I work while studying?
faqs.answer: Most countries allow international students to work part-time during term time. Specific hours and conditions depend on the country's immigration rules.

faqs.question: Are there scholarships available for Indian students?
faqs.answer: Yes, many universities and governments offer merit-based and need-based scholarships for international students. Ask our counselors for scholarship matching.
